series_metadata.series_title: CANCELLED CIGARETTE WHOLESALER ACCOUNT MASTER FILES
series_metadata.series_description: These files for both licensed stampers and non-stampers contain, but are not limited to, license applications, journal entries, applications to purchase cigarette stamps on credit, cigarette bonds, and miscellaneous correspondence.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: 3 yrs end of calendar year or such time as diligent enforcement inquiry is resolved a particular year
